data.location: 3930 S Las Vegas Blvd, Ste 116, The Shoppes At Mandalay Place, Las Vegas
data.short_description: Iris Galerie is slated to open along Mandalay Mile on the Strip at The Shoppes At Mandalay Place. The Paris-born brand offers high-resolution customized eye photography. This is not the first appearance in Las Vegas.

data.location: 5000 Ashley Phosphate Rd., North Charleston, SC 29418
data.status: preparing for reopening / new debut this summer
data.short_description: Frankie’s Fun Park in North Charleston is undergoing renovations ahead of its new debut this summer. The renovation includes a complete overhaul featuring state-of-the-art lighting, updated game layout and upgrades to the kitchen and dining areas.

data.location: near the Meijer grocery store on U.S. 223 in Adrian
data.short_description: Brew Horizons, a franchise group of 7 Brew, will build a new coffee spot near the Meijer grocery store on U.S. 223 in Adrian. This would be the first 7 Brew location in Lenawee County. The project was just recently approved.

data.status: permanently closed its doors last weekend
data.short_description: Uptown Taco restaurant in Floral Park permanently closed its doors last weekend. The restaurant served its final customers on May 10. The owners have sold the restaurant.

data.status: coming to / aiming for an Aug. 1 opening
data.short_description: The Daily Press Cafe is a new concept coming to 22001 Michigan Avenue, Suite 150 in downtown West Dearborn. Owner Mohamad Alshormany is aiming for an Aug. 1 opening.

data.status: final day of dinner service at West Village will be June 7
data.short_description: Marrow Detroit announced the closure of its original West Village location. The butcher shop and restaurant will serve its final meal on June 7.

data.status: will remain open through Memorial Day weekend
data.short_description: The Birmingham location will remain open through Memorial Day weekend.

data.location: Camino Al Norte in North Las Vegas
data.status: will be opening its fifth location on May 19, 2026
data.short_description: Zippy’s Restaurants will be opening its fifth location in Las Vegas on May 19, 2026, at Camino Al Norte in North Las Vegas.

data.status: reopening for dine-in services on May 14, 2026
data.short_description: Calypso Cafe is reopening its Charlotte Avenue location in Nashville this week. The space has been refreshed with operational upgrades aimed at improving the guest experience.

data.location: 2121 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas (operating out of)
data.status: set to bring fresh seafood this spring
data.short_description: The Alaskan Fish Spot is a new food truck set to bring fresh seafood to the Valley. The new mobile eatery will operate out of 2121 E Sahara Ave. Anticipated to open by this spring.
Carrabba’s Italian Grill is embarking on a major development in Tomball. The $2.75 million construction project is slated to start this June and wrap up in March 2027.

data.short_description: Calypso Cafe is reopening its Charlotte Avenue location in Nashville this week. The space has been refreshed with operational upgrades aimed at improving the guest experience.

data.location: 2121 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas (operating out of)
data.status: set to bring fresh seafood this spring
data.short_description: The Alaskan Fish Spot is a new food truck set to bring fresh seafood to the Valley. The new mobile eatery will operate out of 2121 E Sahara Ave. Anticipated to open by this spring.
Carrabba’s Italian Grill is embarking on a major development in Tomball. The $2.75 million construction project is slated to start this June and wrap up in March 2027.

data.status: under new ownership with planned refresh
data.short_description: Victory Bar & Grill has been taken over by new owners Amar Gunda and his wife Sunitha, who also own Wine Cave and Haldi Fine Italian Cuisine in Mount Laurel. The new owners plan to refresh the menu, upgrade TVs, add fire pits and picnic tables, and introduce live music. A new bar menu is set to launch June 1.

Anthony's Restaurant and Pub closed after 12 years in business, serving its final dinner on Saturday, May 9, 2026. The closure followed a fatal shooting incident in the restaurant's overflow parking lot. The team issued an official thank-you to the Joliet community for their years of support.

data.location: 3 W Gay St., West Chester, PA 19380
data.short_description: MaGerk's Pub & Grill, a Maryland-based pub co-founded by Philadelphia natives, is set to open in the former Iron Hill Brewery space in West Chester. No official opening date has been announced, with the landlord indicating the opening is likely still months away. An additional location is also planned in Wyomissing.

data.location: Caroline Street, Edgewood, Atlanta area (Address not specified)
data.status: expected to open in late summer
data.short_description: Crumbl is expanding to Edgewood, operated by KTP Capital as their second Crumbl store in a 1,403-square-foot space on Caroline Street. The location will offer Crumbl's rotating cookie lineup alongside desserts and dirty sodas. The new location is expected to open in late summer.

data.location: Alpharetta City Center, Alpharetta, GA (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Giulia Italian Bakery is opening its fourth location at Alpharetta City Center, offering a community-driven atmosphere with food items displayed for selection. The menu includes croissants, bombolones, baguettes, sandwiches, Italian wine, and coffee. An opening is planned for this summer.

data.location: Lenox Square, Buckhead, Atlanta, GA (Address not specified)
data.short_description: VIỆTVANA is opening a new flagship store at Lenox Square, its newest Buckhead location, in the former Lobster Roll space across from Sweetgreen. The restaurant is expected to open in October and will join three existing locations.

NADC Burger will officially open its first permanent Las Vegas location in Downtown Las Vegas on May 15, 2026, following a successful three-month pop-up at Resorts World Las Vegas. The restaurant features a skate-inspired design with a full bar and is known for its Wagyu cheeseburgers and beef tallow fries. Co-founder and pro skateboarder Neen Williams is expected to attend the grand opening.

data.status: under construction and slated to open this fall
data.short_description: Phin de Louisiane, a Vietnamese-influenced café growing out of a pop-up called Katie's Brewhouse, will specialize in traditional "phin" coffee made with a Vietnamese slow-brew technique. The café is located in a plaza in Youngsville and is currently under construction. It is slated to open this fall.

data.location: 3377 Las Vegas Blvd S #2170, Las Vegas, NV 89109
data.short_description: RedHead Burger, a Miami-based smash burger concept founded in 2019, opened its first Las Vegas location at Grand Canal Shoppes at The Venetian Resort on May 7, 2026. The 50-seat space features red-and-white interiors with indoor and patio seating, operating daily from 11 am to 2 am. The menu includes never-frozen smash burgers, loaded fries, and milkshakes.

data.location: Chesapeake Overlook development, Perryville, MD (Address not specified)
data.status: set to open late this year
data.short_description: Zaxby's has broken ground on a new Perryville location, marking the Atlanta-based chain's Cecil County debut at the Chesapeake Overlook development, operated by Stradford Empowerment Group. The newly constructed restaurant will seat up to 30 diners and feature a dual drive-thru. The operator is aiming to be customer-ready by late November or early December.

data.status: opening timeline is not presently available
data.short_description: Wonder food hall is moving into a Germantown storefront at 20936 Frederick Road, taking over the space previously occupied by Jos. A. Bank. The food hall concept partners with high-profile chefs including Bobby Flay and Marcus Samuelsson to offer multiple dining concepts under one roof. No opening timeline is currently available.

data.status: set to start construction this summer
data.short_description: Qdoba is opening a new Terminal A location at DFW Airport in a fully renovated 3,200-square-foot space, with construction paperwork filed with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation. Construction is set to begin by June 22 and is projected to wrap by November 30. The menu will feature customizable bowls, burritos, quesadillas, and salads.

data.location: I-40 and I-55 split, West Memphis, AR (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Buc-ee's will occupy a 34-acre, 74,000-square-foot lot near the I-40 and I-55 split in West Memphis, featuring 120 gas pumps. The city is currently undergoing a $30 million infrastructure project to prepare for the arrival, with 75% of the work already complete. The Arkansas Department of Transportation anticipates infrastructure work will be completed by December 2027, with Buc-ee's opening in June 2028.

data.status: opening in an existing restaurant space
data.short_description: The team behind A Forkful Food Truck and Catering has filed papers to open a brick-and-mortar restaurant at 2650 Thousand Oaks Boulevard in a 1,622-square-foot space. A certificate of occupancy is currently under review with the Memphis and Shelby County Division of Planning and Development. The concept comes from chef Christopher Yates.

McAlister's Deli is planning to return to Jonesboro following the closure of its South Caraway Road location, with plans to build on a plot at 2024 Fair Park Boulevard. Developer Prateek Gera has a contract pending for the sale of the land, expected to close in approximately three months. The franchisee behind the project, David Kearbey, already owns and operates three McAlister's locations.

Gina's Place is set to reopen on June 1, 2026 in the former McAlister's Deli building at 2400 S Caraway Road, following an abrupt closure in December of last year. Owner Regina McKay announced the date via social media and plans to hold staff interviews during the third week of May. The community has responded with considerable enthusiasm to the news of the restaurant's return.

data.location: 1563 S Commerce St, Las Vegas, NV 89102
data.status: anticipated to open before the end of this spring
data.short_description: Bartho's, Las Vegas's first all-bottle German-influenced beer bar, is set to debut in the Downtown Las Vegas Arts District at 1563 S Commerce St. Construction is nearing completion and the team is working to finalize permits, with a spring 2026 opening confirmed by the owner and general manager. The bar will offer more than 70 global brews alongside art-focused community events.

data.status: slated to wrap up by end of summer
data.short_description: No Diggity is a new café concept under construction at 2307 Bell Street in Houston's East End Revitalized area, with a $250,000 interior renovation of a 1,481-square-foot space. Construction is already underway and slated to wrap up by June, with an opening anticipated before the end of summer. Little information is currently available about the brand beyond its planned coffee offerings.

data.location: 1201 S Main St, Las Vegas, NV 89104
data.short_description: Cobra Clutch Cocktail Bar is set to open in the Las Vegas Arts District at 1201 S Main St, on Brewery Row in a renovated multi-tenant building. A City of Las Vegas permit has been filed and the bar recently held a hiring fair, with its Instagram page indicating a Spring 2026 opening. The business entity behind the opening is TFC Group LLC.

data.status: opening date has not yet been announced
data.short_description: Bosphorus Turkish Cuisine is preparing to open at 6835 Five Star Blvd in Rocklin, offering traditional Turkish fare including hot and cold mezes, kebabs, classic entrées, and homemade desserts. No official opening date has been announced, though the restaurant has been building anticipation via social media. The restaurant is being opened by Didem Dinkay, according to city filings.

data.status: should be open in the next few months
data.short_description: Wingstop has filed a permit to open a new location in the Highlands Shopping Center at 300 North Main Street, taking over two suites in the retail strip. Construction is already underway and slated to be completed in June, with the franchisees — mother-son duo Bebe and David Mora — confirming the opening. The new location is expected to open before the end of summer.

Lobster King Seafood and Wings is opening a new Cordova location in a shared space with A1 Wings & Things at 420 S Germantown Pkwy #108, bringing Cajun seafood into A1's kitchen. The restaurant announced the team-up via Facebook in late April, with a sign permit and certificate of occupancy application currently under review. No opening date has been specified beyond "coming soon."

data.location: 7000 Las Vegas Blvd N, Las Vegas, NV 89115
data.short_description: Salvage City Supper Club is set to make its return to Insomniac’s Electric Daisy Carnival in Las Vegas this spring. The 60-minute immersive dining experience with Chef Matt Rolnick will feature a multi-course family-style tasting menu at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway. It is the 6th evolution of the pop-up from Five Senses Holdings.

data.location: 1405 S Cherry Ln, Fort Worth, TX 76108
data.short_description: Major Perk Coffee is bringing its cafe to a new Fort Worth location. The Weatherford concept will have dine-in and drive-thru options with a larger footprint. It honors uniformed military and first responders.

Lil Pig Lil Pig is a new pork-focused concept from the team behind Thirsty Sasquatch and 3 Howls Distillery. It will feature in-house bakers, rotisserie, live fire cooking, and occasional 4-5 course prix-fixe dinners using humanely raised heritage breed meats. The project combines bodega and supper club elements.

Owner Mike Collman of Da’Hui Hawaiian Bar & Grill submitted liquor licensing for the Tonga Room at 8000 SE Foster Road. The venue includes Video Lottery Machines, live music, and dancing. Details remain limited as it is still too early to share much.

SOKO Butcher is opening a new location on the ground floor of the Grace and Reva apartment building in Crystal City. The butcher shop/sandwich shop/deli/retail concept will sell beer and wine with seating. Another location is also being developed in Leesburg Historic District.

data.location: 1113 SE Rasmussen Blvd, Battle Ground, WA 98604
data.event_date: toward the end of this month
data.short_description: The Savvy Sipper, a new cocktail bar, will replace the closed Emanar Cellars. It promises Classic Cocktails, Gourmet Grazing, and Vintage Vibes. It will join nearby bars and restaurants in the area.

data.location: W Evergreen Blvd & Daniels St, Vancouver, WA 98660
data.short_description: Couve Carts is a new food truck pod in the works at the intersection of West Evergreen Boulevard and Daniels Street. It will include the best food trucks, fire pits, play areas for dogs and kids, and a tap room.

Koyo Hand Roll Bar is opening its second Houston location in the Retail Center in The Heights. Construction is underway on the 1,218 square foot space and is slated to wrap this July. The contemporary upscale sushi concept specializes in made-to-order handrolls.
Billy Ray’s, from Paula and Mark Hylland (owners of The Mule Bar and Mousetrap Tavern), will open in the former Black Water space. The project is in early stages with limited details available.

Nevermore Tavern, inspired by Edgar Allan Poe, will occupy a remodeled 3,500 square foot space at 170 W Main Street, Suite 101. It will feature art, books, literary events, and cocktails as a community hub. Construction is estimated to begin July 1 and wrap by October 1.

data.location: 5781 W Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89146
data.short_description: JP’s Brasserie & Sports Den is slated to open in a small shopping center at 5781 W Sahara Ave, Suite 100. The new restaurant and sports bar from Liam’s Hospitality LLC should open in the next few months.

data.location: 2281 Del Paso Rd, Suite 150, Sacramento, CA 95835
data.short_description: Peet’s Coffee is planned for the Parks Place shopping center in North Natomas. The café would occupy Suite 150 next to Chef Frank Japanese Cuisine in roughly 2,900 square feet.

data.location: 2791 E Bidwell St, Suite 100, Folsom, CA 95630
data.short_description: Rahi Hospitality Group is developing a new restaurant (name and concept not revealed) at the former Red Hot Chilli Pepper space in Broadstone Plaza. The project is a few months from opening.

Naya Comida + Barrita is a contemporary Mexican wood-fire concept from Juan Rios (Agave Azul). The menu centers on wood fire, nixtamal, and mezcal with handcrafted tortillas from organic masa. It is located in Trelago Market.

Stoner’s Pizza Joint will open eight new locations in the Orlando market. The first two include the Orlando Sodo location at 4781 South Orange Avenue. The fast-casual pizza chain uses fresh ingredients with dough made daily.

data.location: 207 N Clarke Rd, Suite 3, Ocoee, FL 34761
data.short_description: Stoner’s Pizza Joint will open eight new locations in the Orlando market. The first two include the Ocoee location at 207 N Clarke Rd, Suite 3. The fast-casual pizza chain uses fresh ingredients with dough made daily.

data.location: 7612 University Blvd Unit 21, Winter Park, FL 32792
data.short_description: Viva Healthy, a healthy food cafe from chef Maria Gabriela Toro, is opening in the “pink house” at Unigold Shopping Center. The brand focuses on health-conscious cuisine.
Salbio Coffee & Bites, a sister cafe from the owner of Candelaria Eatery & Cafe, is opening next door at 4060 Thomas St, Unit B01. Buildout is ongoing with no opening date yet.

On the Bun is a retro-style burger joint bringing smash burgers, shakes, and 1950s diner vibes to Downtown Lowell. The menu includes sliders, hand-cut fries, milkshakes, and vegetarian options. Construction is in final stages.

A new Japanese restaurant from Indigo Road Hospitality Group will open at ground floor of Vandeveer in Downtown Jacksonville. The menu will highlight local ingredients, fresh seafood, robata grill, sushi, and sashimi.
The June is a private members club opening in the historic former Federal Reserve Building. It is a city-centric modern members club with cultural programming.
